Event_Description: Early social media complaints about repair delays and battery range
Complaints accelerate on Twitter/YouTube - viral negative reviews
Volume hits 100K+ quarterly - service infrastructure overwhelmed
IPO listing - service issues discussed in DRHP risk factors
CCPA issues show-cause notice to Ola Electric
MHI asks ARAI to investigate subsidy eligibility violations
Consumer court rulings ordering full refunds + compensation
Reports of bailable warrants over unresolved consumer summons
Hyperservice deployed - 1000 service vans + AI diagnostics
Service backlog reduced 50% - 80% same-day resolution claimed
Gen 3 + improved service driving slight recovery
